title: Influenza (Flu)
content:
DISEASE: Influenza (Flu)
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
Influenza is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses. It can cause mild to severe illness, and in some cases can lead to hospitalization or death.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: fever, chills, muscle_aches, fatigue, headache
Common Symptoms: sore_throat, runny_nose, cough, loss_of_appetite
Rare Symptoms: vomiting, diarrhea, chest_pain

SPECIALIST: General Physician
URGENCY: See doctor within 24-48 hours if symptoms are severe

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Influenza (Flu) typically involves consultation with a General Physician.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Common Cold
content:
DISEASE: Common Cold
SEVERITY: MILD

DESCRIPTION:
The common cold is a viral infection of the upper respiratory tract. It is usually harmless and resolves on its own within 7-10 days.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: runny_nose, sneezing, sore_throat, congestion
Common Symptoms: mild_fever, cough, watery_eyes, fatigue
Rare Symptoms: headache, muscle_aches, loss_of_appetite

SPECIALIST: General Physician
URGENCY: Self-care at home; see doctor if symptoms worsen after 10 days

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Common Cold typically involves consultation with a General Physician.
Most cases can be managed with appropriate rest and medication.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Pneumonia
content:
DISEASE: Pneumonia
SEVERITY: SEVERE

DESCRIPTION:
Pneumonia is an infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs. The air sacs may fill with fluid or pus, causing cough, fever, chills, and difficulty breathing.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: high_fever, chest_pain, cough_with_mucus, shortness_of_breath
Common Symptoms: fatigue, chills, nausea, vomiting
Rare Symptoms: confusion, sweating, rapid_heartbeat

SPECIALIST: Pulmonologist
URGENCY: Seek immediate medical attention

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Pneumonia typically involves consultation with a Pulmonologist.
Prompt medical evaluation is recommended.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Diabetes Mellitus Type 2
content:
DISEASE: Diabetes Mellitus Type 2
SEVERITY: CHRONIC

DESCRIPTION:
Type 2 diabetes is a chronic condition that affects the way the body metabolizes sugar (glucose). With type 2 diabetes, the body either doesn't produce enough insulin, or it doesn't use insulin properly.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: frequent_urination, excessive_thirst, increased_hunger, unexplained_weight_loss
Common Symptoms: fatigue, blurred_vision, slow_healing_wounds, frequent_infections
Rare Symptoms: numbness_in_hands_feet, tingling_sensation, dark_skin_patches

SPECIALIST: Endocrinologist
URGENCY: Schedule appointment with doctor within a week

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Diabetes Mellitus Type 2 typically involves consultation with a Endocrinologist.
Ongoing management and monitoring is required.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Hypertension
content:
DISEASE: Hypertension
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
Hypertension (high blood pressure) is a common condition in which the long-term force of the blood against artery walls is high enough that it may eventually cause health problems.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: headache, dizziness, blurred_vision, chest_pain
Common Symptoms: shortness_of_breath, nosebleeds, fatigue, irregular_heartbeat
Rare Symptoms: blood_in_urine, pounding_in_chest, vision_problems

SPECIALIST: Cardiologist
URGENCY: See doctor within 1-2 days if BP is very high

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Hypertension typically involves consultation with a Cardiologist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Malaria
content:
DISEASE: Malaria
SEVERITY: SEVERE

DESCRIPTION:
Malaria is a serious and sometimes fatal disease caused by a parasite that commonly infects a certain type of mosquito that feeds on humans.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: cyclical_fever, chills, sweating, headache
Common Symptoms: nausea, vomiting, muscle_pain, fatigue
Rare Symptoms: jaundice, confusion, anemia, rapid_breathing

SPECIALIST: Infectious Disease Specialist
URGENCY: Seek immediate medical attention

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Malaria typically involves consultation with a Infectious Disease Specialist.
Prompt medical evaluation is recommended.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Typhoid Fever
content:
DISEASE: Typhoid Fever
SEVERITY: SEVERE

DESCRIPTION:
Typhoid fever is a bacterial infection caused by Salmonella typhi. It spreads through contaminated food and water and causes high fever, abdominal pain, and other symptoms.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: sustained_high_fever, abdominal_pain, headache, weakness
Common Symptoms: constipation, diarrhea, loss_of_appetite, rose_spots
Rare Symptoms: confusion, agitation, hallucinations, relative_bradycardia

SPECIALIST: Infectious Disease Specialist
URGENCY: Seek medical attention immediately

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Typhoid Fever typically involves consultation with a Infectious Disease Specialist.
Prompt medical evaluation is recommended.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Dengue Fever
content:
DISEASE: Dengue Fever
SEVERITY: SEVERE

DESCRIPTION:
Dengue fever is a mosquito-borne tropical disease caused by the dengue virus. It causes flu-like symptoms including fever, headache, muscle and joint pains, and a characteristic rash.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: sudden_high_fever, severe_headache, pain_behind_eyes, joint_muscle_pain
Common Symptoms: skin_rash, mild_bleeding, nausea, vomiting
Rare Symptoms: severe_abdominal_pain, rapid_breathing, bleeding_gums, fatigue

SPECIALIST: Infectious Disease Specialist
URGENCY: Seek immediate medical attention

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Dengue Fever typically involves consultation with a Infectious Disease Specialist.
Prompt medical evaluation is recommended.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Migraine
content:
DISEASE: Migraine
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
A migraine is a powerful headache that often happens with nausea, vomiting, and extreme sensitivity to light and sound. Migraine attacks can last for hours to days.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: severe_headache, throbbing_pain_one_side, nausea, sensitivity_to_light
Common Symptoms: sensitivity_to_sound, vomiting, visual_disturbances, aura
Rare Symptoms: neck_stiffness, confusion, tingling_in_face, weakness

SPECIALIST: Neurologist
URGENCY: See doctor if migraines are frequent or worsening

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Migraine typically involves consultation with a Neurologist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Gastroenteritis
content:
DISEASE: Gastroenteritis
SEVERITY: MILD

DESCRIPTION:
Gastroenteritis is inflammation of the stomach and intestines, typically caused by a viral or bacterial infection. It causes diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach pain.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, stomach_cramps
Common Symptoms: fever, loss_of_appetite, dehydration, headache
Rare Symptoms: muscle_aches, blood_in_stool, severe_abdominal_pain

SPECIALIST: Gastroenterologist
URGENCY: Self-care; see doctor if symptoms last more than 3 days

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Gastroenteritis typically involves consultation with a Gastroenterologist.
Most cases can be managed with appropriate rest and medication.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Asthma
content:
DISEASE: Asthma
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
Asthma is a condition in which your airways narrow and swell and may produce extra mucus. This can make breathing difficult and trigger coughing, a whistling sound (wheezing) when you breathe out and shortness of breath.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: shortness_of_breath, wheezing, chest_tightness, coughing
Common Symptoms: difficulty_sleeping, shortness_of_breath_on_exercise, fatigue
Rare Symptoms: rapid_breathing, bluish_lips, anxiety, sweating

SPECIALIST: Pulmonologist / Allergist
URGENCY: Seek emergency help if breathing is severely impaired

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Asthma typically involves consultation with a Pulmonologist / Allergist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Urinary Tract Infection (UTI)
content:
DISEASE: Urinary Tract Infection (UTI)
SEVERITY: MILD

DESCRIPTION:
A urinary tract infection (UTI) is an infection in any part of the urinary system. Most infections involve the lower urinary tract — the bladder and the urethra.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: burning_urination, frequent_urination, cloudy_urine, pelvic_pain
Common Symptoms: strong_smelling_urine, blood_in_urine, lower_back_pain, fever
Rare Symptoms: nausea, vomiting, shaking_chills, confusion

SPECIALIST: Urologist
URGENCY: See doctor within 1-2 days

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Urinary Tract Infection (UTI) typically involves consultation with a Urologist.
Most cases can be managed with appropriate rest and medication.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Anemia
content:
DISEASE: Anemia
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
Anemia is a condition in which you lack enough healthy red blood cells to carry adequate oxygen to your body's tissues. Having anemia, also referred to as low hemoglobin, can make you feel tired and weak.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: fatigue, weakness, pale_skin, shortness_of_breath
Common Symptoms: dizziness, irregular_heartbeat, chest_pain, cold_extremities
Rare Symptoms: headache, cognitive_problems, brittle_nails, unusual_cravings

SPECIALIST: Hematologist
URGENCY: See doctor within a few days

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Anemia typically involves consultation with a Hematologist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Appendicitis
content:
DISEASE: Appendicitis
SEVERITY: EMERGENCY

DESCRIPTION:
Appendicitis is an inflammation of the appendix. It's a medical emergency that almost always requires prompt surgery to remove the appendix.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: severe_abdominal_pain_right_lower, nausea, vomiting, fever
Common Symptoms: loss_of_appetite, abdominal_bloating, inability_to_pass_gas, diarrhea
Rare Symptoms: constipation, inability_to_stand_straight, back_pain

SPECIALIST: Surgeon
URGENCY: EMERGENCY - Seek immediate medical attention

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Appendicitis typically involves consultation with a Surgeon.
Emergency medical care is required immediately.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Tuberculosis (TB)
content:
DISEASE: Tuberculosis (TB)
SEVERITY: SEVERE

DESCRIPTION:
Tuberculosis (TB) is a potentially serious infectious disease that mainly affects the lungs. The bacteria that cause tuberculosis are spread from person to person through tiny droplets released into the air.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: persistent_cough_3_weeks, coughing_blood, chest_pain, weight_loss
Common Symptoms: fatigue, fever, night_sweats, chills
Rare Symptoms: loss_of_appetite, swollen_lymph_nodes, joint_pain

SPECIALIST: Pulmonologist / Infectious Disease Specialist
URGENCY: See doctor immediately

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Tuberculosis (TB) typically involves consultation with a Pulmonologist / Infectious Disease Specialist.
Prompt medical evaluation is recommended.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: COVID-19
content:
DISEASE: COVID-19
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
COVID-19 is a respiratory illness caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus. Symptoms range from mild to severe and can include fever, cough, and difficulty breathing.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: fever, dry_cough, fatigue, loss_of_taste_smell
Common Symptoms: sore_throat, headache, body_aches, shortness_of_breath
Rare Symptoms: chest_pain, confusion, difficulty_speaking, skin_rash

SPECIALIST: General Physician / Pulmonologist
URGENCY: Isolate and consult doctor; seek emergency care if breathing is difficult

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for COVID-19 typically involves consultation with a General Physician / Pulmonologist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Chicken Pox
content:
DISEASE: Chicken Pox
SEVERITY: MILD

DESCRIPTION:
Chickenpox is a highly contagious viral infection causing an itchy, blister-like rash on the skin. It is caused by the varicella-zoster virus.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: itchy_blisters, fever, tiredness, loss_of_appetite
Common Symptoms: headache, stomach_ache, skin_rash_spreading
Rare Symptoms: secondary_bacterial_infection, pneumonia, brain_inflammation

SPECIALIST: General Physician / Dermatologist
URGENCY: Consult doctor for antiviral treatment if needed

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Chicken Pox typically involves consultation with a General Physician / Dermatologist.
Most cases can be managed with appropriate rest and medication.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Jaundice
content:
DISEASE: Jaundice
SEVERITY: MODERATE

DESCRIPTION:
Jaundice is a condition in which the skin, whites of the eyes and mucous membranes turn yellow because of a high level of bilirubin, a yellow-orange bile pigment.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: yellow_skin, yellow_eyes, dark_urine, fatigue
Common Symptoms: abdominal_pain, pale_stool, itching, weight_loss
Rare Symptoms: fever, vomiting, loss_of_appetite, confusion

SPECIALIST: Gastroenterologist / Hepatologist
URGENCY: See doctor within 1-2 days

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Jaundice typically involves consultation with a Gastroenterologist / Hepatologist.
Medical consultation is advised.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Arthritis
content:
DISEASE: Arthritis
SEVERITY: CHRONIC

DESCRIPTION:
Arthritis is inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain and stiffness that can worsen with age. The most common types are osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: joint_pain, joint_stiffness, joint_swelling, reduced_range_of_motion
Common Symptoms: fatigue, warmth_around_joints, redness_around_joints
Rare Symptoms: fever, weight_loss, anemia, skin_nodules

SPECIALIST: Rheumatologist
URGENCY: Schedule appointment with specialist

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Arthritis typically involves consultation with a Rheumatologist.
Ongoing management and monitoring is required.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.

title: Heart Attack (Myocardial Infarction)
content:
DISEASE: Heart Attack (Myocardial Infarction)
SEVERITY: EMERGENCY

DESCRIPTION:
A heart attack occurs when the flow of blood to the heart is severely reduced or blocked. The blockage is usually due to a buildup of fat, cholesterol and other substances in the heart arteries.

SYMPTOMS:
Primary Symptoms: chest_pain_pressure, pain_radiating_to_arm_jaw, shortness_of_breath, sweating
Common Symptoms: nausea, lightheadedness, fatigue, rapid_heartbeat
Rare Symptoms: indigestion_like_pain, upper_back_pain, anxiety, cold_sweat

SPECIALIST: Cardiologist
URGENCY: EMERGENCY - Call ambulance immediately (dial 112)

TREATMENT OVERVIEW:
Treatment for Heart Attack (Myocardial Infarction) typically involves consultation with a Cardiologist.
Emergency medical care is required immediately.

DISCLAIMER:
This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.
